dependencies: Dependence on fuel purchased in the open market
Dependence on petrochemical-based products for landfill operations
Reliance on third-party disposal facilities under put-or-pay agreements
risks: Fuel price volatility due to geopolitical developments and actions by OPEC
Supply chain disruption related to vehicles, trucks and mechanical/electrical components
Dependence on third-party disposal facilities with take-or-pay commitments
Petrochemical price increases affecting landfill liner costs

regulatory_risks: Compliance with Resource Conservation and Recovery Act (RCRA) Subtitle C and D regulations
Compliance with Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation and Liability Act (CERCLA)
Compliance with Clean Water Act discharge permits and wetlands regulations
Compliance with Clean Air Act landfill gas emission regulations and greenhouse gas controls
Compliance with Occupational Safety and Health Act (OSHA) standards
State and local environmental regulations for landfill design, operation, closure and post-closure
Waste reduction and recycling mandates by states and municipalities
Extended producer responsibility regulations
Organic diversion regulations (e.g., California food waste rules)
Minimum recycled content regulations (e.g., California packaging requirements)
Flow control laws restricting waste transportation across jurisdictional boundaries
Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS) program regulations affecting landfill gas-to-energy projects
Regulation of PFAS and other chemicals of emerging concern
Limitations or bans on disposal of certain waste types
Canadian federal and provincial environmental regulations (CEPA, provincial acts)
Canadian Greenhouse Gas Pollution Pricing Act carbon pricing system
Proposed Canadian regulations to reduce methane emissions from landfills
Maritime regulations including Jones Act cabotage laws for vessel operations
International Ship and Port Facility Security Code (ISPS Code) compliance
United States Nuclear Regulatory Commission (USNRC) regulations for radioactive waste
Toxic Substances Control Act (TSCA) regulations for PCBs and asbestos
Surface Transportation Board and Federal Highway Administration regulations
Permit requirements subject to denial, revocation, modification and renewal
Climate-related disclosure requirements (SEC Final Rule 33-11275)
Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT) proposed regulations affecting renewable energy investments
